metadata.title:
High Water Carries Away Everything but .


Couple Of Weak StrIngers.

pages.raw_text:
The Havermale st. bridge went
out this morning. All that is left
of it are a couple of weak stringers
from Howard st. across the river
and onto Havermale ST.


The wrecked members are lodged
against the temporary structure
erected in place of the bridge the
Washington Water Power Co.
knocked down on Howard ST.. and
this structure will go out with the
continual pounding of the heavy
timbers unless the swarm of work
men get the debris cleared away.


The river has heavy fall at this
point and the water is higher than
it has ever been this season. The
board of public works, city en-
gineers and numerous bridgemen
are busy trying to save the temper
airy bridge. Street cars have
stopped, passengers refusing to ride
over the structure.


1t was o'clock this morning be-
fore the condition of the bridge was
discovered, yet up till that time
